creator: kmgaughan@eircom.net
text:
These two ports install the same library (albeit devel/py_otp_interface installs 0.97 and devel/py-interface installs 0.96).

Fix: 

Remove devel/py-interface and update and dependent ports to depend on devel/py_otp_interface. devel/py_otp_interface should probably be updated to fix its naming too.
How-To-Repeat: Not applicable.
